description_long: This is an L-shaped wooden desk with a rich, medium-brown finish and a smooth, flat work surface. The desk features a prominent right-side pedestal containing three vertically stacked drawers with round wooden knobs, providing ample storage space. The left side of the desk is supported by a solid panel, while a horizontal shelf connects the two sides beneath the main surface, offering additional storage or foot space. The desk's design is modern yet practical, with clean lines and a sturdy build suitable for both professional and home environments. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, enhancing its visual appeal and giving it a warm, inviting look. There are no visible signs of wear, and the overall construction appears robust and well-crafted.
description: A modern L-shaped wooden desk with a three-drawer pedestal, a connecting lower shelf, and a smooth, medium-brown finish. The desk is sturdy, practical, and visually appealing with visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main work surface, three-drawer pedestal on the right, and the connecting lower shelf.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid left panel and the depth of the main work surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back, lower connecting shelf, and the solid left support panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the right pedestal and the open space beneath the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the three-drawer pedestal and the open leg space, while the solid panel forms the left side support.
